ucs.title: [LLM] Medusa ABYSSWORKER BYOVD: smuol.sys / renamed-gmer driver drop followed by EDR service termination
ucs.description: Hunts Medusa ransomware's signature 'EDR killer' chain — dropping a stolen/revoked Chinese-signed kernel driver (most often smuol.sys, also tracked as ABYSSWORKER, a renamed gmer.sys variant) into a temp path and then issuing IOCTLs / sc stop / net stop / taskkill to terminate Defender, Sense, CrowdStrike, SentinelOne, Cylance, etc. before the gaze.exe encryptor runs.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Filesystem.file_path) as file_path values(Filesystem.process_name) as drop_process from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.file_name IN ("smuol.sys","gmer.sys","killer.sys","ksdumperclient.sys","abysswalker.sys","truesight.sys") OR (Filesystem.file_name="*.sys" AND Filesystem.file_path IN ("*\\Temp\\*","*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*","*\\ProgramData\\*","*\\Users\\Public\\*")) by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.user Filesystem.file_name | `drop_inputlookup_filter` | rename Filesystem.* as * | join type=inner dest [| tstats summariesonly=true count values(Processes.process) as kill_cmd values(Processes.process_name) as kill_proc from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("sc.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","taskkill.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND Processes.process IN ("*stop*MsMpEng*","*stop*Sense*","*stop*WinDefend*","*stop*SecurityHealthService*","*stop*CSFalconService*","*stop*SentinelAgent*","*stop*CylanceSvc*","*stop*CarbonBlack*","*MsSense*","*Stop-Service*Defender*","*Set-MpPreference*-Disable*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name _time | rename Processes.* as *] | where abs(lastTime - _time) < 1800 | table firstTime dest user file_name file_path drop_process kill_proc kill_cmd | convert ctime(firstTime)
ucs.kql:
let _Window = 30m;
let _DriverDrops = DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where ActionType == "FileCreated"
    | where FileName endswith ".sys"
    | where (FileName in~ ("smuol.sys","gmer.sys","killer.sys","ksdumperclient.sys","abysswalker.sys","truesight.sys","rentdrv2.sys"))
        or (FolderPath has_any (@"\Temp\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\"))
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("msiexec.exe","trustedinstaller.exe","setup.exe","wuauclt.exe")
    | project DropTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, DroppedDriver = FileName, DriverPath = FolderPath,
              DropperProcess = InitiatingProcessFileName, DropperCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              DropperAccount = InitiatingProcessAccountName;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where FileName in~ ("sc.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","taskkill.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","wmic.exe")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("MsMpEng","Sense","WinDefend","SecurityHealthService","WdNisSvc","CSFalconService","CSAgent","SentinelAgent","SentinelHelperService","CylanceSvc","CbDefense","CarbonBlack","McAfee","ekrn","MBAMService","Sophos")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("stop","delete","taskkill","Stop-Service","Set-MpPreference -Disable","Remove-MpPreference")
| join kind=inner _DriverDrops on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (DropTime - _Window .. DropTime + _Window)
| project DropTime, KillTime = Timestamp, DeviceName, DropperAccount,
          DroppedDriver, DriverPath, DropperProcess, DropperCmd,
          KillProcess = FileName, KillCmd = ProcessCommandLine
| order by DropTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _Window = 30m;
let _DriverDrops = ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventType == "FileCreated"
    | where TargetFileName endswith ".sys"
    | where (TargetFileName in~ ("smuol.sys","gmer.sys","killer.sys","ksdumperclient.sys","abysswalker.sys","truesight.sys","rentdrv2.sys"))
        or (TargetFilePath has_any (@"\Temp\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\"))
    | where ActingProcessName !in~ ("msiexec.exe","trustedinstaller.exe","setup.exe")
    | project DropTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, DroppedDriver = TargetFileName, DriverPath = TargetFilePath,
              DropperProcess = ActingProcessName, DropperCmd = ActingProcessCommandLine, DropperUser = ActorUsername;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where NewProcessName has_any ("\\sc.exe","\\net.exe","\\net1.exe","\\taskkill.exe","\\powershell.exe","\\pwsh.exe","\\wmic.exe")
| where CommandLine has_any ("MsMpEng","Sense","WinDefend","SecurityHealthService","WdNisSvc","CSFalconService","CSAgent","SentinelAgent","SentinelHelperService","CylanceSvc","CbDefense","CarbonBlack","McAfee","ekrn","MBAMService","Sophos")
| where CommandLine has_any ("stop","delete","taskkill","Stop-Service","Set-MpPreference -Disable","Remove-MpPreference")
| join kind=inner (_DriverDrops) on $left.Computer == $right.DvcHostname
| where TimeGenerated between (DropTime - _Window .. DropTime + _Window)
| project DropTime, KillTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, DroppedDriver, DriverPath, DropperProcess, DropperCmd, KillProcess = NewProcessName, KillCmd = CommandLine
| order by DropTime desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Medusa Ransomware ABYSSWORKER / smuol.sys EDR-Killer Driver Drop
id: f3a9e2c4-91d6-4e8c-bc1a-medusabyovd001
status: experimental
description: Detects creation of revoked / abused signed kernel drivers in temp paths used by Medusa ransomware's ABYSSWORKER (renamed gmer) BYOVD EDR-killer prior to gaze.exe encryption.
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/07
references:
  - https://www.elastic.co/security-labs/abyssworker
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa25-071a
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: file_event
detection:
  driver_name:
    TargetFilename|endswith:
      - '\smuol.sys'
      - '\gmer.sys'
      - '\killer.sys'
      - '\ksdumperclient.sys'
      - '\abysswalker.sys'
      - '\truesight.sys'
      - '\rentdrv2.sys'
  driver_in_temp:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '.sys'
    TargetFilename|contains:
      - '\Temp\'
      - '\AppData\Local\Temp\'
      - '\ProgramData\'
      - '\Users\Public\'
  filter_legit:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\msiexec.exe'
      - '\TrustedInstaller.exe'
      - '\setup.exe'
      - '\wuauclt.exe'
  condition: (driver_name or driver_in_temp) and not filter_legit
fields:
  - Image
  - TargetFilename
  - User
  - CommandLine
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate driver installers run from extracted setup directories
level: high
tags:
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1562.001
  - attack.t1068
  - threat.medusa
  - threat.medusalocker
ucs.rationale: ABYSSWORKER (smuol.sys) is the named kernel-mode EDR-killer that Mandiant, Elastic Security Labs and CISA AA25-071A specifically attribute to the Medusa ransomware affiliate program — a renamed/repacked gmer.sys signed with stolen Chinese certs that exposes IOCTLs to terminate protected EDR processes. Generic 'driver dropped to Temp' detections fire on dozens of vendors; pinning to this specific f
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] Medusa gaze.exe encryptor: recovery-inhibit chain (vssadmin/wmic shadow delete + bcdedit recovery disable + Service Stop fan-out)
ucs.description: Hunts the Medusa ransomware encryptor (gaze.exe / lock.exe) execution preceded by its hard-coded inhibit-recovery sequence: Volume Shadow Copy deletion via vssadmin AND wmic, bcdedit recoveryenabled No / bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures, plus mass service stop of MSSQL/Exchange/Veeam/backup services within a tight window — the canonical Medusa pre-encrypt fingerprint documented in CISA AA25-071A.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmds values(Processes.process_name) as procs values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND ((Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*shadow*") OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*No*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("sc.exe","net.exe","net1.exe") AND Processes.process="*stop*" AND Processes.process IN ("*MSSQL*","*SQLAgent*","*Veeam*","*Backup*","*MSExchange*","*Acronis*","*VSS*")) OR (Processes.process_name IN ("gaze.exe","lock.exe") OR Processes.process IN ("*gaze.exe*-V*","*gaze.exe*-d*","*gaze.exe*-i*"))) by Processes.dest Processes.user span=10m | rename Processes.* as * | eval has_vss=if(match(cmds,"(?i)delete\s+shadows|shadowcopy.*delete"),1,0), has_bcd=if(match(cmds,"(?i)recoveryenabled\s+no|bootstatuspolicy\s+ignoreallfailures"),1,0), has_svc_stop=if(match(cmds,"(?i)stop.*(MSSQL|Veeam|Backup|MSExchange|Acronis)"),1,0), has_gaze=if(match(procs,"(?i)gaze\.exe|lock\.exe"),1,0) | eval signal_score=has_vss+has_bcd+has_svc_stop+(has_gaze*2) | where signal_score >= 3 | table firstTime lastTime dest user signal_score has_vss has_bcd has_svc_stop has_gaze procs parents cmds | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let _Bin = 10m;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| extend
    IsVssDelete = (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "shadows")
               or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
               or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-CimInstance Win32_ShadowCopy","Remove-WmiObject")),
    IsBcdEdit = FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled No","recoveryenabled no","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"),
    IsSvcStop = FileName in~ ("sc.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
              and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("stop","Stop-Service","delete")
              and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("MSSQL","SQLAgent","SQLWriter","Veeam","Backup","MSExchange","Acronis","VSS","VeeamDeploymentService","BackupExec","MEMCM"),
    IsGazeBin = FileName in~ ("gaze.exe","lock.exe","medusa.exe")
             or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("gaze.exe -V","gaze.exe -d","gaze.exe -i",".medusa","!READ_ME_MEDUSA!.txt","!!!READ_ME_MEDUSA!!!")
| where IsVssDelete or IsBcdEdit or IsSvcStop or IsGazeBin
| summarize
    Bucket = bin(Timestamp, _Bin),
    FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
    LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
    VssDeletes = countif(IsVssDelete),
    BcdEdits = countif(IsBcdEdit),
    SvcStops = countif(IsSvcStop),
    GazeHits = countif(IsGazeBin),
    SampleCmds = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 25),
    Parents = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 10)
    by DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, _Bin)
| extend SignalScore = VssDeletes + BcdEdits + SvcStops + (GazeHits * 2)
| where SignalScore >= 3 or GazeHits > 0
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let _Bin = 10m;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend FileName = tostring(split(NewProcessName, "\\")[-1])
| extend
    IsVssDelete = (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete" and CommandLine has "shadows")
               or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and CommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
               or (FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has_any ("Get-WmiObject Win32_Shadowcopy","Get-CimInstance Win32_ShadowCopy","Remove-WmiObject")),
    IsBcdEdit = FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled No","recoveryenabled no","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"),
    IsSvcStop = FileName in~ ("sc.exe","net.exe","net1.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
              and CommandLine has_any ("stop","Stop-Service","delete")
              and CommandLine has_any ("MSSQL","SQLAgent","SQLWriter","Veeam","Backup","MSExchange","Acronis","VSS","BackupExec"),
    IsGazeBin = FileName in~ ("gaze.exe","lock.exe","medusa.exe")
             or CommandLine has_any ("gaze.exe -V","gaze.exe -d","gaze.exe -i",".medusa","!READ_ME_MEDUSA!")
| where IsVssDelete or IsBcdEdit or IsSvcStop or IsGazeBin
| summarize
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    VssDeletes = countif(IsVssDelete),
    BcdEdits = countif(IsBcdEdit),
    SvcStops = countif(IsSvcStop),
    GazeHits = countif(IsGazeBin),
    SampleCmds = make_set(CommandLine, 25),
    Parents = make_set(ParentProcessName, 10)
    by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, _Bin)
| extend SignalScore = VssDeletes + BcdEdits + SvcStops + (GazeHits * 2)
| where SignalScore >= 3 or GazeHits > 0
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.rationale: CISA AA25-071A and analyst reports from Symantec/Broadcom and SentinelOne specifically describe Medusa's pre-encryption sequence: gaze.exe is the documented encryptor binary name, '.medusa' is the file extension, '!READ_ME_MEDUSA!.txt' is the ransom note filename, and the inhibit-recovery chain combines vssadmin+wmic shadowcopy delete with bcdedit recoveryenabled/bootstatuspolicy in tight successi
